title: taraxacum serrulatum
intro: Taraxacum serrulatum, also known as the common sowthistle or dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum serrulatum include its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders such as constipation and bloating. Taraxacum serrulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used as a culinary ingredient in salads and as a coffee substitute.
